message:
fix: exclude pinned beads from bd list by default (bd-uhcg)

Pinned beads are permanent references, not actionable work items. They
were incorrectly appearing in `bd list --status=open` and the default
listing. Now pinned beads are excluded by default via two mechanisms:

1. The pinned boolean filter defaults to false (excludes pinned=true)
2. StatusPinned is added to the default ExcludeStatus list

Use --pinned, --status=pinned, or --all to see pinned beads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/onyx
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
